name: Markdown
description: Safe GFM markdown renderer with strict sanitization by default

safeMode.description: Strict sanitization mode for product-safe rendering.

allowRawHtml.description: Allow raw HTML blocks from markdown source (still sanitized).

linkTarget.description: Link target behavior for rendered anchors.

linkRel.description: Link rel value for rendered anchors.

membrane.description: Outer membrane wrapper around component geometry.

props.content:
# Markdown Capability Demo

This single document shows core **Markdown + GFM** features.

## Headings
### H3
#### H4
##### H5
###### H6

## Emphasis
- *Italic text*
- **Bold text**
- ***Bold italic text***
- ~~Strikethrough text~~
- Inline code: `const mode = "strict"`

## Links
- Inline link: [Userface](https://userface.dev)
- Relative link: [Docs](/docs)
- Autolink: https://example.com/docs?tab=markdown

## Blockquote
> Design systems fail when visual rules are optional.
>
> Keep primitives consistent and contracts explicit.

## Lists
- Item A
- Item B
  - Item B.1
  - Item B.2

1. Plan
2. Implement
3. Validate

- [x] Parse markdown
- [x] Sanitize output
- [ ] Ship release

## Table (GFM)
| Token | Meaning | Example |
| :---- | :------ | ------: |
| `--uf-space-1` | Base micro spacing | 2px |
| `--uf-control-height` | Control height baseline | 32px |

---

## Code blocks
```ts
export function clamp(value: number, min: number, max: number): number {
  return Math.min(max, Math.max(min, value))
}
```

```bash
pnpm install
pnpm run dev
pnpm run lint
```

## Image
![Markdown preview image](https://picsum.photos/800/240 "Markdown demo image")

## Escaping
Use a literal asterisk: \*not italic\*

First paragraph with a soft break.
Still first paragraph.

Second paragraph with a [link](/docs).

# Heading 1
## Heading 2
### Heading 3
#### Heading 4
##### Heading 5
###### Heading 6
> This is a blockquote.\n>\n> It can span multiple lines and paragraphs.

- Apple
- Banana
- Cherry

1. First
2. Second
3. Third

- Parent A
  - Child A1
  - Child A2
    - Grandchild A2.1
- Parent B

1. Step one
   1. Detail one
   2. Detail two
2. Step two

- [x] Build parser
- [x] Add sanitizer
- [ ] Write tests
- [ ] Ship release
Use `pnpm run dev` to start local development.\n\nSet `safeMode=true` for strict mode.

| Name | Role | Score |
| :--- | :---: | ---: |
| Alice | Admin | 98 |
| Bob | Editor | 87 |
| Carol | Viewer | 75 |

# Product Notes

> Weekly summary for the release train.

## Checklist
- [x] API contract
- [x] UI parity
- [ ] QA pass

## Metrics
| Metric | Value |
| :-- | --: |
| Build time | 2m 31s |
| Bundle delta | +14kb |

Run `pnpm run lint` before opening PR.

Styled raw HTML block
Paragraph after raw HTML.

Raw HTML allowed with relaxed sanitization.
\n\n
MoreExtra info.
Open [external docs](https://example.com) in a new tab.

notes: Markdown is an approved rich-text exception: generated headings, paragraphs, lists and tables cannot route every node through Text.
Inline code and code blocks use mono typography tokens.
Code/pre backgrounds still reference primitive black alpha variables; migrate to semantic code-surface tokens in the token alias cleanup slice.
